commands.repair_reason: The remaining work is a narrow repair to the PR branch: expand parent skill roots and preserve managed-root ownership semantics, with focused tests.; Needs attention: The PR introduces a concrete supply-chain concern by letting plugin skill publication replace existing managed skill symlinks.; Review finding: [P2] Expand parent skill roots before publishing — src/agents/skills/plugin-skills.ts:126-127 - [P2] Preserv... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds managed-directory symlink publication for plugin-declared skills, regression tests for that helper, and a changelog entry for the linked plugin skill discovery bug.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main resolves enabled plugin skill paths and loads them as extra dirs, but no current path publishes them to the managed or agent discovery roots named in the report. The PR-introduced failure is also source-reproducible with any manifest that declares ./skills and stores SKILL.md in child directories.
commands.review_followup: The remaining work is a narrow repair to the PR branch: expand parent skill roots and preserve managed-root ownership semantics, with focused tests.

target.title: fix #77296: [Bug]: Plugin manifest `skills` field not published to agent skill discovery paths
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt
